creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Time to plan for your next beach getaway!

📍 @kitebeachcenter.uaq in Umm Al Quwain
🤎 Relaxed boho vibes, aesthetic decors, chill atmosphere 
🍴 Hearty food selection. We had Kite Beach Special Breakfast (68 AED), Cappuccino (25 AED), Smoothie (25 AED), Grilled Seafood (70 AED)
☀️ Free use of sunbed. Bring your own towel.
🎟️ Beach Access: 45 AED per adult on weekdays
🕕 6 AM to 10 PM
🛖 Beach hut: 250 AED (7 hours use). Please check Kite Beach Center official website for booking.

How to get there by public transport from Dubai?
🚍 Take the Ras Al Khaimah bus from Union Bus Station.
🎟️ 10 AED
📍 Don’t forget to tell the driver you’ll alight in Umm Al Quwain.
🚕 From UAQ bus stop, take a taxi to Kite Beach Center. No taxi meter, so negotiate the fare.
⚠️ Note that there’s no bus from UAQ to Dubai, so you have to take a taxi to Ajman and ride the bus from there or ask the driver to take you straight to your drop off location. We did the latter. 

Tag your beach buddies!
